anomalies.message: RESOLVED: Stripped trailing section header from Q06 stem and explanation. Pollution was '# 二、选择题(本题共8小题，每小题4分，满分32分)' from paper line 12.
anomalies.evidence: Paper Markdown Q6 is fill-in-blank. Section header clearly belongs to 第二大题, not Q6.

anomalies.message: RESOLVED: Added missing closing parenthesis. Paper source had '则 $x$ 等于（' — corrected to '则 $x$ 等于( )'.
anomalies.evidence: All other multiple-choice questions in paper use '( )' to indicate answer slot. Truncation is clearly an OCR/typo.

anomalies.message: RESOLVED: Rebuilt all 4 options from paper Markdown lines 77-83. Only B/C were extracted previously. Options A and D used \mathrm{} formatting for labels.
anomalies.evidence: Paper Markdown explicitly provides all 4 options with labels (A)(B)(C)(D). Solutions confirm answer is (A).

anomalies.message: RESOLVED: Cleaned section header pollution. Q14 stem/options previously contained '# 三、解答题(本题共9小题，满分94分．解答应写出文字说明、证明过程或演算步骤)' from next section.
anomalies.evidence: Section header belongs to section 三 (解答题), not to Q14 (multiple choice in section 二).

activeIssues.message: Explanation text has run-on sentence: '极小值为当 (-9,-3) 时' — the min value 3 for (9,3) is not explicitly stated before jumping to the max case. Solution Markdown may have OCR omission.
activeIssues.evidence: Solution line 334. Not uniquely recoverable from Markdown alone.
activeIssues.suggestedAction: Human should verify against PDF source (solutions/2004年解析/2f4ebac7-...origin.pdf) whether this is an OCR transcription error or present in the original text.

activeIssues.message: Solution uses '\dot{\mathbf{BA}}^{*}' (dot accent over BA) while paper uses '\mathbf{B}\mathbf{A}^{*}'. OCR artifact — dot accent over multi-letter bold is very unlikely to be intentional.
activeIssues.suggestedAction: Human should verify against PDF. The intended formula is almost certainly Paper version without dot accent.

activeIssues.message: OCR digit spacing artifact: '7 0 0' in solution method 2 (e.g., 'v(0) = 7 0 0'). Method 1 keeps '700' correctly. Not content-breaking.
activeIssues.suggestedAction: Human may fix spacing if desired; does not affect correctness.

activeIssues.message: Paper uses fullwidth parentheses '（12）' for Q12 while other questions use halfwidth. Source formatting variation, not a data error.
